releases.label: All-Sky Data Release
releases.summary: Final all-sky release covering 99.998% of the sky — Point Source Catalog with 470,992,970 sources, Extended Source Catalog with 1,647,599 resolved sources (10 arcsec to ~2 deg), and 4,121,439 J/H/Ks Atlas Images; completeness limits ~J=15.8, H=15.1, Ks=14.3 at high Galactic latitude. Survey complete; no further updates.
